content:
Ahem, Hello Linkdin peeps...

It's been a long time since I last posted any update.

It's not like I didn't do anything meanwhile, which was suitable for me to share in linkedin though...

My previous internship terminated(without me receiving a certificate lol, doesn't mean I didn't work with honesty there, I did but I couldn't go to meetings and offline events of theirs due to some issues which was a compulsion for interns to get a certificate at last.)

Anyways, I don't regret it, I didn't really need any certificate, but the exposure and experience of working with the team and doing something worthwhile... 
I learned about team work, understood how the media pages are handled, graphic designed lots of posters, attended meetings(online hehe) and stufff...

After that a lot of things happened to me, and then I did a lot of things as well...
feels like 'New year 2026' was just 6 days ago, but it's already been 6 months and sommme more days... 

Gosh!

I was just randomly singing today, it's basically just a sher I heard somewhere...

I usually record like this with an intention that this time I'll start my page in some platform and start uploading and start building my content, and everytime due to some reason or the other I give up on this thought.

The exact same was happening today as well, but then I thought, what if I post this on LinkedIn??? 
ummm I mean people share memes and what not.... :)

so here's my dump...

and yeah don't worry the sher is very relatable to the LinkedIn's context.

I hope you'd like it...

Gracias!
🤍
comment: One thing often overlooked is that early experiences are not only about certificates; the ability to show what you learned, built, and contributed becomes the real proof over time.
